svg.content: <mxGraphModel> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/> <object id="deploy" label="Sandbox Deployment<br>(1 container)"> <mxCell style="shape=note;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;backgroundOutline=1;darkOpacity=0.05;fillColor=#FFF2CC;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="100" width="140" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </object> <object id="apiserver" label="K8s API Server"> <mxCell style="shape=hexagon;perimeter=hexagonPerimeter2;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fixedSize=1;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="240" y="90" width="120" height="80" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </object> <object id="webhook" label="micewriter-k8s-injector<br>(Mutating Webhook)"> <mxCell style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F8CECC;strokeColor=#b85450;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="220" y="220" width="160" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </object> <mxCell id="group_pod" value="Injected Pod" style="swimlane;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DAE8FC;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="440" y="40" width="300" height="260" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <object id="sandbox_container" label="Sandbox Container"> <mxCell style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="group_pod"> <mxGeometry x="20" y="50" width="120" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </object> <object id="engine_container" label="Engine Sidecar"> <mxCell style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="group_pod"> <mxGeometry x="160" y="50" width="120" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </object> <object id="vol_uds" label="emptyDir<br>(UDS Socket)"> <mxCell style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#FFE6CC;strokeColor=#d79b00;" vertex="1" parent="group_pod"> <mxGeometry x="100" y="150" width="100" height="80" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </object> <object id="vol_pvc" label="RocksDB PVC"> <mxCell style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#FFE6CC;strokeColor=#d79b00;" vertex="1" parent="group_pod"> <mxGeometry x="220" y="150" width="70" height="80" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </object> <mxCell id="e1" value="Apply" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" edge="1" parent="1" source="deploy" target="apiserver"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" value="Intercept" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="apiserver" target="webhook"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" value="Mutate" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" edge="1" parent="1" source="webhook" target="group_pod"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"><mxPoint x="410" y="250"/><mxPoint x="410" y="170"/></Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" edge="1" parent="group_pod" source="sandbox_container" target="engine_container"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.25;entryY=0;" edge="1" parent="group_pod" source="sandbox_container" target="vol_uds"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.75;entryY=0;" edge="1" parent="group_pod" source="engine_container" target="vol_uds"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;exitX=0.75;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" edge="1" parent="group_pod" source="engine_container" target="vol_pvc"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel>
